channel.title: Ekam Chat Platform Updates
channel.description: Stay updated with the latest secure features, architectural enhancements, and news from Ekam Chat Platform.

item.title: Ekam Evolution: Multi-Room Group Management & Real-time Presence Restored
item.description: Ekam introduces state-of-the-art multi-room group management, member moderation, and real-time presence indicators via native WebSocket/SSE integration.

item.title: Securing Ekam Workspace: End-to-End Authentication Security Upgrades
item.description: A detailed guide explaining the latest updates to security schemas, identifier mapping, and Supabase integration to guarantee authentication and privacy.
